_comment: POSTABLE football staff roles only — coaches and managers. Detection is by ROLE CUES bound to the subject's name in the source text, NOT a per-name list. 'staff' is intentionally empty (no hardcoded names). Directors, executives and agents are NOT here — they are rejected via data/protected_entities.json (only PLAYER, COACH and MANAGER are publishable per spec). 'departure_cues'/'appointment_cues' word the staff news accurately.
